title: Fix up `image sign` in PR 2108
body:
fix #2108 
- move Unmarshal policy.json form cmd/trust.go to pkg/trust
- GetGPGId methods with single argument instead of array
- move formatter methods(func getPolicyOutput()) from pkg/trust to cmd/trust.go 
- move variable declaration to the top of the functoin 

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @QiWang19 Please fixup your commit message to explain what  you are doing.
@mtrmac Are you happy with this PR Now?
